---
name: Feature Request (Generative Engine Expansion)
about: Propose a new Math Engine, Svelte parameter UI, or pipeline optimization.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sumosizedginger
---

## Architectural Principle

Does this feature belong in the **Core Math Engine** (pure logic decoupled from Svelte) or the **UI Layer** (Svelte reactivity, panels, DOM elements)?

## Feature Description

_A clear and concise description of what you want to construct natively._

## Mathematical Implementation (For Generators)

If proposing a new algorithm or SVG pattern, briefly outline the matrix logic. Will it use `Math.sin()` loops? Does it utilize SVG Filters? SVG Masks?

## Alternative Solutions

_Have you considered implementing this as a generic composition of existing layers?_

## Additional Context

_Sketches, parameter mockups, or codepens demonstrating the SVG math layout._
